creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #5)

As of /usr/ports -r415874 attempted builds on amd64 still get the same error when:

OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=LLD

is in place.

I ran "make config" and turned off lld and lldb. Rerunning portmaster built the rest and allowed the overall build that llvm37 was part of to continue.
